title: Larger Advancement Tab
description: Allows you to change the scale of the advancement window.
body: # Larger Advancement Tab Fabric mod that adds a setting to increase the size of the advancements tab. ## Settings Tab **Window Scale** Scales the width and height by x, mod's default is 2, vanilla default is 1. Extreme values may have unexpected results. **Dim Background on Advancement Hover** Adds an option to disable the background dimming when hovering over an advancement icon. By default, vanilla dims background ## Examples *All example screenshots come from a 2560x1440 display with a gui scale of 2. **0.5 Scale** You can make it smaller if you'd like, although I do not see why you would do this. ___ **1.0 Scale** Vanilla's default size. ___ **2.0 Scale** Mod's default size. ___ **3.0 Scale** ___
